recentPapers.title: Building Intelligent Systems with Machine Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Practical approaches to integrating machine learning into real-world intelligent systems with emphasis on explainability.

recentPapers.title: Feature Engineering for Machine Learning Models
recentPapers.abstract: A comprehensive guide to effective feature engineering techniques that improve model performance and interpretability.

recentPapers.title: Knowledge Graphs and Semantic Web Technologies
recentPapers.abstract: Integration of knowledge graphs with machine learning for enhanced reasoning and semantic understanding.

recentPapers.title: Efficient Convolutional Networks for Edge Devices
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices with minimal accuracy loss.

recentPapers.title: Real-Time Object Detection in Video Streams
recentPapers.abstract: Optimized computer vision pipelines for real-time object detection and tracking in streaming video data.

recentPapers.title: Adversarial Robustness in Vision Models
recentPapers.abstract: Techniques for improving the adversarial robustness of deep neural networks for computer vision tasks.

recentPapers.title: Scalable Machine Learning for Big Data
recentPapers.abstract: Distributed machine learning frameworks for processing and analyzing large-scale datasets efficiently.

recentPapers.title: Systems Programming for ML Infrastructure
recentPapers.abstract: Low-level systems design patterns for building efficient machine learning infrastructure and runtime systems.

recentPapers.title: Data Quality and Machine Learning Performance
recentPapers.abstract: Exploring the impact of data quality metrics on the performance and reliability of machine learning models.
